Culturally speaking, Japan copied and preserved all of China's culture from 2,000 years ago; Japan is like a time capsule that preserves ancient China.

comments.author: @suanna7870
comments.text:
It is a fact that Taiwanese people are not Chinese. Taiwanese are indigenous peoples, comprising 16 ethnic groups belonging to the Austronesian language family, including the Amis, Atayal, Paiwan, Bunun, Puyuma, Rukai, Tsou, Saisiyat, Yami (Tao), Thao, Kavalan ＇, Taroko, Sakizaya, Seediq, Kanakanapu, and La'alua, among others. They are distributed across New Zealand, Australia, New Guinea, Java, and Southeast Asian countries.

The island's indigenous people have intermarried with people from various countries around the world, including the Netherlands, Japan, China (during the Ming and Qing dynasties), and a small number of families and veterans of the Kuomintang who retreated to Taiwan.

Culturally, Taiwan boasts a diverse array of cultures from around the world, as well as a rich variety of languages ​​and cuisines, making it a food paradise. It also possesses diverse humanities and geographical characteristics, with frigid, subtropical, and tropical environments, and a beautiful natural setting. It is a beautiful island nation, a sovereign and independent country belonging to the Austronesian language family. Its people cherish freedom, love, peace, and democracy. We welcome people from all over the world to visit Taiwan. Thank you, and best wishes to everyone. ❤❤❤👍👍

comments.author: @The.white.viking
comments.text:
Yes, there is a lot of beauty in Taiwan and extreme nature, but it becomes a problem every time I am not a Muslim and therefore use normal toilets Which there is a great lack of... and really ruins the desire to go out and see the rest of Taiwan!!! and as a diabetic also sugar-free drinks and other things besides tea.. Which is impossible in restaurants. But there's always a 7-Eleven.
These are some of the problems that Taiwan needs to take seriously in order to make trustism work.

replies.author: @josephligocki7171
replies.text: Most people? High housing prices is an international problem and Taiwan is no exception. That being said, Taiwan’s cost of living, considering Taiwanese people’s decent income and bountiful job opportunities, are low and very affordable! Taiwan has the most vibrant and fast growing economy (economic growth rate is #1 in the whole wide world), thanks to its world leading semiconductor and AI industries!

replies.author: @Tankman_8964TAM
replies.text:
台灣房價高漲是要拜前執政黨國民黨馬英九時期專門炒房炒地皮所賜，馬執政時期是台灣經濟最黑暗時代，薪資倒退20~30年，他執政短短八年房價卻漲高三四倍，這是台灣人皆知的事情，你若不知，那表示你根本不是台灣人。
直到民進黨蔡英文總統上任，讓台商撤離中國回台與新南向政策，讓台灣經濟有所成長，並創造40年來最好的經濟成長率，人均GPD並超越了日本韓國，所以民進黨比親中共的國民黨（又稱賣台黨）好上千百倍
